hero.headline: Family friendly local pub serving Bushy's beer and great food

about.lead: Welcome to The Garrison, a historic gem dating back to 1640, nestled in Castletown, the ancient capital of the Isle of Man.
paragraphs: Steeped in history and charm, our pub offers a delightful retreat in the shadows of the majestic Castle Rushen.

Enjoy a pint of our finest beers on tap, lovingly crafted by the renowned team behind Bushy's Brewery. Savour traditional cuisine with our hearty breakfast, lunch, and dinner menus. The Garrison Pub promises a unique and memorable experience, blending heritage with modern comforts.

menus.title: Spring Food
menus.description: Our seasonal main menu — hearty plates and pub classics.

menus.title: Breakfast
menus.description: Served 9am to 11am. A proper start to the day.

menus.title: Sunday Roasts
menus.description: Traditional roasts every Sunday. Booking recommended.

menus.title: Drinks
menus.description: Bushy's beers on tap, Fynoderee spirits and more.

menus.title: Kids
menus.description: Little ones welcome — a menu just for them.

games.heading: Old-school games, modern fun
games.body: Our brand new Games Room at The Garrison offers a nod to traditional pub entertainment. You'll find old-school games such as table skittles, cribbage and bar billiards — a sense of nostalgia and fun for players of all ages.
games.note: Available to local clubs and societies, bookable for no cost Monday through Wednesday. Open to the public Thursday through Sunday.

contact.heading: Find us & say hello
contact.lead: For general inquiries, please use the details below or drop us a message.
contact.address: 5 Castle St, Castletown, Isle of Man, IM9 1LF
